title: 主题海报版式设计
description: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMI
prompt_raw: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMIÉRE"} and {argument name="product type" default="MOISTURE RICH CREAM"} with "AGING CARE*" below it. The background consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The lighting is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese typography reads {argument name="main headline" default="肌に、静かな贅沢を。"} above a small decorative gold divider and the text {argument name="subheadline" default="高保湿×エイジングケア*"}. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains Japanese text meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action button with a thin gold border containing the text {argument name="button text" default="詳しく見る"} and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains Japanese text meaning '*Care according to age'.
prompt_preview: A luxurious cosmetic product advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, light-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading {argument name="brand name" default="LUMI
prompt_display_cn:
案例「brand name」属于海报/封面。这是一张海报/封面类案例，重点在主视觉、标题、情绪、构图和传播冲击力。适合改成活动海报、电影海报、专辑封面、产品发布海报、小红书封面或宣传 KV。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A luxurious cosmetic 商品 advertisement featuring a single elegant glass jar with a shiny gold lid resting on a round, 光线-colored marble slab. The jar has gold text reading 【brand name：LUMIÉRE】 and 【商品 type：MOISTURE RICH CREAM】 with "AGING CARE*" below it. The 背景 consists of soft, draped, shimmering champagne-colored silk fabric with delicate white flowers on the left. The 光线ing is warm, ethereal, and sun-drenched with soft bokeh. At the top center, elegant dark brown Japanese 字体排版 reads 【main headline：肌に、静かな贅沢を。】 above a small decorative gold divider and the text 【subheadline：高保湿×エイジングケア*】. To the right of the jar, a thin gold circle contains 日文文字 meaning 'With dense moisture, high-quality firmness and radiance'. At the bottom center is a dark rectangular call-to-action 按钮 with a thin gold border containing the text 【按钮 text：詳しく見る】 and a right-pointing chevron. In the bottom right corner, tiny fine print contains 日文文字 meaning '*Care according to age'.
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的【海报/封面类型】。

主视觉：
画面中心是【主视觉对象】，呈现【动作/状态/姿态】，具有强烈视觉吸引力。

标题文字：
主标题写【主标题】，副标题写【副标题】。文字位置为【文字位置】，字体风格为【字体风格】，要求清晰可读。

画面风格：
整体采用【视觉风格】，氛围为【情绪氛围】，主色调为【主色调】，光影为【光影效果】。

背景与元素：
背景包含【背景元素】，辅助元素包括【装饰元素/符号/纹理】，但不要抢夺主视觉。

构图要求：
采用【构图方式】，层次明确，适合远看抓眼、近看有细节。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布平台/使用场景】。
